dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gravestone Doji identified via small body_pct (indecision), upper wick significantly larger than lower wick (rejection at highs), occurring during uptrend. Exit on mean reversion cross above 20-SMA. Success rate ~51% in both bull and bear markets suggests moderate edge. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days given pattern-based nature.

backtest_rule.reason: Gravestone Doji identified via small body_pct (indecision), upper wick significantly larger than lower wick (rejection at highs), occurring during uptrend. Exit on mean reversion cross above 20-SMA. Success rate ~51% in both bull and bear markets suggests moderate edge. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days given pattern-based nature.

source_rule_text: Gravestone Doji: A doji candle occurring in an uptrend, theoretically indicating indecision leading to bearish reversal
